headline: Congress takes a light Friday before Judiciary fires up Monday with judge confirmations and hearings galore

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met in pro forma session Thursday afternoon and adjourned briefly. Lawmakers are gearing up for a busy Monday with judicial confirmations on the docket, including votes on two federal judge nominees.

onTheFloor.title: Circuit Judge nomination for the Second Circuit
District Judge nomination for the Southern District of Texas
onTheFloor.status: confirmation vote scheduled for 5:30 PM Monday

house.lastSessionSummary: The House held a brief session Thursday, introducing 39 bills and 3 resolutions while filing six committee reports on various measures. No votes were taken as the chamber adjourned after just three minutes.

onTheFloor.title: Sunshine Protection Act of 2025 — daylight saving time reform
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs Appropriations Act, 2027
Take Care of America's Veterans Act
ALS Act reauthorization through fiscal year 2031
IMPROVE Initiative at National Institutes of Health

committees.topic: Hearing on Sunshine Protection Act, defense appropriations, veterans benefits, and privacy in purchases

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation and VA disability claims modernization
